evals.name: valuation-attribution-binding-drift
evals.prompt: Review the valuation attribution API changes across Rust, finstack-py, and finstack-wasm. I want to know if the Python stubs, WASM names, parity contract, and tests all match the canonical Rust API.
evals.expected_output: A binding parity review that lists every mirrored surface checked, flags missing stubs/exports/parity entries, and recommends targeted python-build/parity/WASM verification.
